tooltip.aewireless_connect.1: The mode of wireless transceiver is wrong!
tooltip.aewireless_connect.2: shift + Right Click ： Connect to wireless transceiver
aewireless.tooltip.failopen: This is %s's wireless transceiver, you don't have permission to open it.
config.aewireless.title: AE Wireless Config
config.aewireless.option.baseEnergy: Default energy consumption of master wireless transceiver
config.aewireless.option.shiftAutoConnec: Enable auto-connect when placing blocks while sneaking
config.aewireless.option.isCacheLoad: Enable full cache mode for wireless direct connection?
config.aewireless.option.isEnergy.commen: If enabled, the wireless transceiver will consume energy for transmission.
config.aewireless.option.batteryMultipli: Sub energy consumption = Distance between Main and Sub × Energy multiplier.
config.aewireless.option.maxDistance.com: Maximum transmission distance between Sub and Main wireless transceivers(0 for unlimited).
config.aewireless.option.crossDimensiona: If enabled, the wireless transceiver will allow cross-dimensional connections (ignoring distance limits).
config.aewireless.option.shiftAutoConnec: If enabled, placing blocks while sneaking will attempt to auto-connect using a wireless connector in your inventory.
config.aewireless.option.isCacheLoad.com:
If enabled, all block information will be cached, but the chunk needs to stay loaded; otherwise, the connection will be lost (better performance).  
If disabled, block information will be retrieved via real-time ticks, and the connection will not be lost (worse performance).
